title: Sysmon DNS Query to Known C2 Framework Domains
description: Detects DNS queries to domains associated with known C2 frameworks and dynamic DNS services commonly used by attackers for C2 infrastructure.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Query Name' like '*.duckdns.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.no-ip.com' or 'Query Name' like '*.no-ip.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.no-ip.biz' or 'Query Name' like '*.ddns.net' or 'Query Name' like '*.zapto.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.hopto.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.serveftp.com' or 'Query Name' like '*.sytes.net' or 'Query Name' like '*.ngrok.io' or 'Query Name' like '*.ngrok-free.app' or 'Query Name' like '*.portmap.io' or 'Query Name' like '*.serveo.net')) or (('Query Name' like '*.onion.ws' or 'Query Name' like '*.tor2web.io' or 'Query Name' like '*.cloudfront-distro.net' or 'Query Name' like '*.azurewebsites.net' or 'Query Name' like '*.herokuapp.com')))
falsepositives: Legitimate use of dynamic DNS services
